meaning: 君士坦丁堡(土耳其西北部港市伊斯坦布尔
examples: You will have heard of Constantinople, friend?
The Bishop of Constantinople was important because it was Constantinople.
Well, eventually the Ottoman Turks attacked Constantinople, it eventually fell.
Ciragan was the last palace built in Constantinople by the Ottoman Empire for royal family members.
Land forces, aided by the navy, would advance to Constantinople, and Turkey would surrender.
